wine_schools.name: Escuela de Capataces de Sanlucar
wine_schools.address: Calle Barrameda 12, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda, Spain
wine_schools.description: The traditional cellar-masters school of Sanlucar de Barrameda, training capataces de bodega in venencia technique, solera management, flor biology and sherry classification. One of the few formal vocational programmes for the Jerez DO production chain.
courses_offered: Flor biology and biodynamics of Manzanilla
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 120 venencia workshop to EUR 900 full capataz programme

wine_schools.name: WSET Andalucia at AIS Cadiz
wine_schools.description: WSET-approved programme provider serving the Cadiz province, delivering Level 2 and Level 3 Award in Wines with a specific sherry enrichment module. Classes held in Cadiz city with optional field visits to Jerez bodegas.
courses_offered: WSET Level 2 Award in Wines with Sherry Module
WSET Level 2 Spirits (Brandy de Jerez focus)

wine_schools.name: Sherry Educator Certification Programme
wine_schools.address: Calle Alameda Vieja 5, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_schools.description: The Consejo Regulador del Jerez runs the official Sherry Educator certification. The programme covers the complete Jerez DO from grape to glass: Palomino Fino agronomy, albariza soils, biologically and oxidatively aged styles, solera systems and the VORS/VOSJ quality ladder.
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 75 masterclass to EUR 550 full educator certification

verified.address_quoted: Calle Alameda Vieja 5, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_schools.name: Maestro Sierra Solera Workshops
wine_schools.address: Calle Ponce 1, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_schools.description: Private tasting and education sessions run by the Maestro Sierra family bodega, covering the complete lifecycle of oxidative sherry: Oloroso ageing, solera management and single-cask vintage identification. Strictly small group by appointment.

wine_schools.name: Lustau Sherry Academy
wine_schools.address: Calle Arcos 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_schools.description: Lustau runs an educational programme within the bodega covering all styles of the Jerez DO. The Academy delivers guided tastings, food pairing workshops and the full Lustau range from Jarana Fino through the Almacenista single-cask series.
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 25 introductory to EUR 85 Almacenista masterclass

verified.address_quoted: C/ Arcos, 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_schools.name: Gonzalez Byass Tio Pepe Sherry School
wine_schools.address: Calle Manuel Maria Gonzalez 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_schools.description: An in-bodega education programme run by Gonzalez Byass covering Palomino Fino viticulture, albariza geology, flor yeast biology and the full spectrum of Jerez DO styles. The premium Sherry School session concludes with a VORS tasting in the historic La Concha cellar.
courses_offered: Fino Jerez: from vineyard to glass (2 hours)
Brandy de Jerez Lepanto focused session
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 30 standard to EUR 95 VORS masterclass
certifications: Gonzalez Byass Tio Pepe participation certificate

verified.address_quoted: C. Manuel Maria Gonzalez, 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera
